scripts.build: npm run build:admin && npm run build:miniapp
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w shared && npm run lint -w admin && npm run lint -w miniapp
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w shared && npm run typecheck -w admin && npm run typecheck -w miniapp
scripts.test: npm run test -w shared && npm run test -w admin
scripts.guardrails: node shared/scripts/check-no-raw-colors.mjs && FOUNDATIONS_STRICT=1 npm run foundations:lint -w shared && npm run storybook:check -w shared
